channel.title: Thoughtful Engineering
channel.description: A blog about software craftsmanship and engineering culture

item.title: Why We Chose Rust for Our Backend
item.description: After years of Go, we switched our core services to Rust. Here's what we learned.
item.author: alice@thoughtful.engineering (Alice Chen)

item.title: The Art of Code Review
item.description: Code review is not about finding bugs. It's about sharing knowledge.
item.author: bob@thoughtful.engineering (Bob Park)

item.title: Observability Beyond Metrics
item.description: Metrics, logs, and traces are just the beginning. True observability requires a cultural shift.
item.author: alice@thoughtful.engineering (Alice Chen)
